scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/index.js && bun build ./src/schema/index.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/schema/index.js && bun build ./src/schema/_relations.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/schema/_relations.js && bun build ./src/schema/auth.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/schema/auth.js && bun build ./src/schema/budget.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/schema/budget.js && bun build ./src/schema/category.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/schema/category.js && bun build ./src/schema/invoice.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/schema/invoice.js && bun build ./src/schema/notification.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/schema/notification.js && bun build ./src/schema/transaction.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/schema/transaction.js && bun build ./src/schema/wallet.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/schema/wallet.js
